timeline.notes: Greig (black) and Anthony (red) facing each other. Approaching.

timeline.visual_reasoning: CLEAR slap/bump visible. Greig (black, left) and Anthony (red, right) both have arms extended, hands touching in a handshake/slap. Classic BJJ roll start.
timeline.notes: ROLL START — slap/bump. Both players touch hands.
Anthony immediately sits to guard after the slap. Greig standing.
Greig engaging Anthony's seated guard from standing.
timeline.coaching_tip: Grip knees or ankles before committing weight.

timeline.visual_reasoning: Decision tree: Q1 mirrored? Not yet — Anthony initiating one-sided leg hook.
timeline.notes: Anthony entering leg entanglement. Hooking Greig's leg.
timeline.coaching_tip: Backstep when you feel the hook.

timeline.visual_reasoning: Decision tree: Q1 mirrored? YES. Q2 same direction? YES. Q3 outside leg? NO → fifty_fifty.
timeline.coaching_tip: Fight for top position. Control the far knee.

timeline.visual_reasoning: Decision tree: Q1 mirrored? YES. Q3 outside leg over hip? YES → eighty_twenty for Greig.
timeline.notes: Greig transitions from 50/50 to 80/20. Outside leg gaining dominance.
timeline.coaching_tip: Use 80/20 to backstep out into passing.

timeline.visual_reasoning: Decision tree: Q1 mirrored? YES. Q3 outside leg? NO → fifty_fifty again.
timeline.coaching_tip: Anthony keeps pulling you in. Control his feet at the entry.

timeline.notes: Greig gaining top control. Escaping the entanglement.
Greig extracting from leg entanglement. Mid-pass.
Greig in top half guard. One leg still trapped.
Pass complete! Greig in side control.

timeline.coaching_tip: Look for americana or advance to mount.

timeline.notes: Anthony recovers to half guard. First reguard.
timeline.coaching_tip: Need faster advancement from side control.

timeline.notes: Open guard. Anthony has recovered fully.

timeline.coaching_tip: Stay low, control knees, deny underhook.

timeline.notes: Greig in headquarters. Setting up pass.
timeline.coaching_tip: Commit to knee slide with crossface.

timeline.notes: Half guard battle. Greig applying crossface.

timeline.coaching_tip: Go directly to mount this time.

timeline.notes: Anthony recovers to half guard again.

timeline.visual_reasoning: Decision tree: Q1 mirrored? YES → fifty_fifty. Third entry.
timeline.coaching_tip: Address this at the entry point.

timeline.notes: SWEEP! Anthony sweeps from closed guard.
timeline.coaching_tip: Broken posture = swept. Stand up in closed guard.
Frame on neck and hip. Shrimp.
Trap and roll or elbow-knee escape.

timeline.notes: Round ends. Both players separate. Time called or mutual stop.

summary.session_overview: 3:39 open mat roll at Tempo Jiu Jitsu. Roll starts with slap/bump at 0:03 and ends with time/mutual stop at 3:42. Three 50/50 leg entanglement exchanges in the first 1:55. Greig escaped all three using 80/20 and passed to side control multiple times but couldn't consolidate. Anthony swept from closed guard at 2:40 and spent the final minute on top advancing to mount. No submission — round ended by time.

key_moments.suggestion: Good to identify exact roll start for timing analysis.

key_moments.description: Anthony hooks Greig's leg from seated guard → entering 50/50.
key_moments.suggestion: Control feet BEFORE engaging seated guard.

key_moments.description: Greig transitions from 50/50 to 80/20 using outside leg dominance.
key_moments.suggestion: This is the correct 50/50 escape. Backstep out faster.
You know it's coming. Prevent the mirrored leg wrapping.
STAND UP in closed guard. Every time.
Post-sweep recovery too slow. Frame and shrimp immediately.
Good resilience — fought to the end despite being on bottom.

top_3_improvements: 50/50 defence: Three entries in one roll. Prevent mirrored leg wrapping by controlling feet before engaging seated guard.
Passing consolidation: Passed 4+ times, never advanced to mount. Side control → mount within 3 seconds.
Closed guard posture: Swept at 2:40 from broken posture. STAND UP to break guard.
strengths_observed: 80/20 escape from 50/50 — correct technique using outside leg dominance
Persistent top pressure — kept re-passing despite 4+ reguards
Resilience — fought to the end from bottom after being swept
summary.guard_retention_reason: After sweep at 2:40, gave up positions to mount. Limited bottom retention.
summary.positional_awareness_reason: Good 80/20 escape but repeatedly caught in 50/50 and swept from closed guard.
summary.transition_quality_reason: Clean passes but never consolidated to mount. 50/50 escapes were smooth.
summary.overall_notes: Roll duration: 3:39 (slap/bump at 0:03, round end at 3:42). No submission — ended by time. Three main patterns: Anthony's 50/50 entries, the pass-reguard cycle, and the closed guard sweep. All three are addressable with specific drilling.
